title: Mission Completion
description: When the agent believes the mission is done, it POSTs a completion interaction to the PS's interaction_endpoint with a Markdown summary. The PS presents the summary to the user. The user either ACCEPTS — the PS terminates the mission and returns 200 OK — or responds with follow-up questions via clarification, keeping the mission active. See §1285 (Mission Completion) and §1098 (Interaction Endpoint).

mission_blob.title: Mission being completed
mission_blob.description: Agent is reporting completion of this approved mission.
mission_blob.markdown:
# Analyze Q2 Customer Feedback

Read customer feedback records and produce a summary report with sentiment analysis and key themes.

approved_tools.name: ReportWriter
approved_tools.description: Write the summary report to the shared drive

steps.label: POST /interaction {type=completion, summary, mission}

request_body.summary:
# Q2 Feedback Analysis Complete

Read 1,247 feedback records across April–June and produced `q2-feedback-summary.pdf` on the shared drive.

**Headline numbers:** avg rating 4.2 ⭐ · 68% positive · 22% neutral · 10% negative.

**Top three themes:** (1) onboarding flow friction, (2) billing page clarity, (3) requests for dark mode.

annotations: Agent signs the request with its agent token via Signature-Key: sig=jwt.
type="completion" and summary is a Markdown string (§1113).
mission binds the completion to the mission by approver + s256 (§1114).
AAuth-Capabilities is NOT sent on PS endpoints (§1731).
PS returns 202 + Location because user acceptance requires human interaction (§1179).

steps.label: User reviews completion summary
steps.response_body:
Mission Completion Report

Analyze Q2 Customer Feedback

Agent aauth:local@agent.example reports this mission is complete:

Q2 Feedback Analysis Complete

Read 1,247 feedback records across April–June and produced q2-feedback-summary.pdf on the shared drive.

Headline numbers: avg rating 4.2 ⭐ · 68% positive · 22% neutral · 10% negative.

Top three themes: onboarding flow friction, billing page clarity, dark mode requests.
annotations: PS notifies the user (push notification, email, or in-app) that the agent proposes completion.
User reviews the Markdown summary at the PS's UI.
User clicks Accept — PS will terminate the mission and return 200 to the agent.
Alternatively, the user MAY respond with follow-up questions via clarification (§1179), keeping the mission active.

steps.label: Poll /pending/c5d9a3b7 → 200 (mission terminated)
annotations: User accepted — PS returns 200 OK on the next poll (§1179).
PS terminates the mission — it transitions to the terminated state (§2967, no suspended state).
After termination, subsequent PS requests bound to this mission return mission_terminated (§1298).
Existing auth tokens tied to the mission remain valid only until they expire — the PS will NOT issue new auth tokens under this mission s256.
The PS retains the mission log (§1277) for audit even after termination.

events.label: User accepts
events.detail: User reviews summary and accepts completion

events.label: Mission terminated
events.detail: PS terminates the mission; mission log retained for audit
